subcodes.title: Message to the Baha'is of New York from Thonon-les-Bains, 1911-08-26
subcodes.first_line: In this Cause, hundreds of families have sacrificed themselves. There have been more than twenty thousand martyrs.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @contention and conflict
